candidate_summary: Humane AI Pin ($699) wearable AI device launch; a high-profile 2024 product that the market largely rejected.
observed_outcome_summary: Shipped only ~10,000 units by August 2024 against a 100,000-unit first-year hope; between May and August 2024 more AI Pins were RETURNED than purchased. Humane was acquired by HP (~$116M, Feb 2025) and the AI Pin was discontinued. A clear negative-outcome / market-rejection case where returns outpaced sales.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'Humane Inc.', verbatim: '$699' (later '$499'); 'began shipping in April 2024'; 'until August only shipped 10,000 units'; 'between May and August, more Ai Pins were returned than purchased'; 'HP would acquire most of Humane Inc. for $116 million' with the AI Pin 'discontinued'. (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: ~10,000 units shipped by Aug 2024 vs a 100,000-unit hope; returns then outpaced sales. Tier-1 purchase action, but the headline outcome is rejection. Figures are press estimates ('around 10,000').

reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1. HIGH-VALUE negative case: a hyped product with a small buyer count and returns>sales (a rare observable net-negative buyer signal). Recommended designation: TRAINING. Unit/return figures are press estimates, not audited.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
press_estimates_not_audited: ~10,000 units and return figures are reported press estimates, not an audited Humane disclosure
net_negative_buyer_signal: returns exceeded new sales May-Aug 2024 (realized buyers below gross)
